ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES company_sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES company_industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for dividends and splits */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., exchange, third-party API) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "market_weight" REAL /* Market weight of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  "market_weight" REAL /* Market weight of the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the portfolio is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock in the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company (stock) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares owned */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio stock */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes or comments about the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
